title: bupleurum ranunculoides var. telonense
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides var. telonense, also known as Bupleurum or Chinese Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have numerous health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting liver and immune system function. Bupleurum is often prepared in herbal teas, capsules, or infusions, and is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and balance.
